app.name: KantongKu
app.tagline: Bookkeeping for Indonesian SMEs, aligned with SAK EMKM

auth.tryDemo: Try the demo — no signup needed
auth.demoDataNotice: Demo data is public and may change at any time.
auth.demoLoginError: Failed to sign in to the demo account

onboarding.slide1Description: An easy-to-use bookkeeping app for your business — no accounting knowledge required.
onboarding.slide2Description: Every time money comes in or goes out, record it here. Pick the type, category, and amount — done.
onboarding.slide2Tip: Example: sold iced tea for Rp 50,000 — choose Income, then Sales.
onboarding.slide3Description: KantongKu automatically builds your Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement from every transaction.
onboarding.slide3Tip: These reports can be printed and shared with a bank or investor.
onboarding.slide4Title: Your business is ready to be recorded
onboarding.slide4Description: Start by recording your first transaction. Recording consistently means healthier business finances.

validation.linesMustBalance: Total debit and credit must be equal before the transaction can be saved

journal.empty: No transactions yet. Click Add Entry to start recording.
journal.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. "{{description}}" will be permanently deleted.
journal.modeJurnalHelper: Use this mode if you understand debits and credits. Example: Cash sale = Debit Cash, Credit Sales.
journal.debitCreditTooltip: Debits and credits record changes to accounts. Use this mode if you understand this concept.
journal.accountForCategoryMissing: No account is set up for this category yet. Add one in Chart of Accounts.

dashboard.subtitle: A summary of your business finances
dashboard.cashFlowTooltip: Cash Flow shows the movement of money in and out of your business's cash/bank accounts.

ledger.selectAccountPrompt: Select an account to view its ledger.
ledger.noMovements: No movements. Try changing the period or selecting a different account.

labaRugi.title: Income Statement
labaRugi.subtitle: Revenue, expenses, and profit/loss for the current period
labaRugi.cogsTooltip: COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) is the direct cost of producing or purchasing the goods that were sold.

neraca.title: Balance Sheet
neraca.subtitle: Financial position as of a given date
neraca.equityTooltip: Equity is the owner's stake in the business — the difference between assets and liabilities.
neraca.imbalanceWarning: Warning: Total Assets does not equal Total Liabilities + Equity

arusKas.title: Cash Flow Statement
arusKas.subtitle: Operating, investing, and financing activities
arusKas.noCashTransactions: No cash transactions yet for this period. Transactions will appear once a Cash or Bank account is used.
arusKas.beginningCash: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Beginning of Period
arusKas.endingCash: Cash and Cash Equivalents, End of Period

perubahanModal.title: Statement of Changes in Equity
perubahanModal.subtitle: Changes in owner's equity over the period
perubahanModal.priveTooltip: Owner's Withdrawal (Prive) is business money withdrawn by the owner for personal use.

neracaSaldoPenutupan.title: Post-Closing Trial Balance
neracaSaldoPenutupan.subtitle: Real account balances after the closing entries are applied
neracaSaldoPenutupan.noClosedPeriods: No period has been closed yet. Close a period first on the Settings page.
neracaSaldoPenutupan.selectPeriodPrompt: Select a period to view its post-closing trial balance.
neracaSaldoPenutupan.noRealBalances: No real account balances for this period.
neracaSaldoPenutupan.imbalanceWarning: Warning: Total Debit does not equal Total Credit

settings.addCompanyHint: New companies automatically get the standard SAK EMKM chart of accounts.
settings.periodSubtitle: Manage periods and close out the fiscal year
settings.periodCloseSuccess: Period closed successfully, closing entries have been created
settings.closePeriodConfirmBody: Once closed, Revenue, Expense, COGS, and Owner's Withdrawal accounts will be reset to zero and their balances moved to Equity. New transactions cannot be recorded in this period. This action cannot be undone.

accounts.pageSubtitle: Chart of Accounts aligned with SAK EMKM
accounts.cogsTooltip: COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) is the direct cost of producing or purchasing the goods that were sold.
accounts.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Account "{{account}}" will be permanently deleted.
